headline: Lahad Datu Anniversary Marks 13 Years Without Security Resolution
context: The 13th anniversary of the 2013 Lahad Datu incursion passed with ESSCOM still operating without permanent legal mandate.

cards.big: Lahad Datu anniversary marks 13 years without permanent security solution
cards.sub: ESSCOM still operates under temporary provisions renewed annually

cards.big: Sulu armed group killed 8 Malaysian security forces and 52 intruders in 2013
cards.sub: Incident exposed critical gaps in eastern Sabah maritime surveillance

cards.big: ESSCOM 10-year operations plan proposed permanent security zone legislation
cards.sub: Cabinet has deferred the bill through 4 parliamentary sessions since 2022

cards.big: Eastern Sabah security zone covers 1.4 million sq km of sea territory
cards.sub: Permanent base infrastructure in Semporna is only 45% complete

cards.big: Anniversary tests whether crisis-driven security measures become permanent institutions
13 years after Lahad Datu without security resolution. Eastern Sabah's vulnerability persists despite ESSCOM.
